failure_times.description: The times (in hours) at which each of the 5 failed units failed during the test period.

num_surviving_units.description: The number of units that survived (did not fail) through the entire 72-hour test period.

test_duration.description: The total duration of the test period in hours, used to calculate operating hours for surviving units.

num_failures.description: The total number of units that failed during the test period, used as the numerator in the failure rate calculation.
